message:
Add preset queries and summary aggregation to the evidence command

Introduce --preset (replay-anomalies, repair-failures, pressure-transitions)
and --summary flags for operator-oriented evidence analysis. Each preset
selects a curated set of EvidenceEventType variants; summary mode aggregates
records into domain-specific breakdowns (ReplaySummary, RepairSummary,
PressureSummary) with counts, time spans, and per-domain metrics.

Adds structured logging with operation_id, preset, and outcome fields.
Enforces mutual exclusion between --preset and --event-type flags.

8 new tests covering preset filtering, summary aggregation, JSON schema
stability, and CLI argument parsing. Progresses bd-h6nz.7.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
